data.title: Twenty One Capital Raises Additional $100 Million Through Convertible Bond Offering
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bitcoin company Twenty One Capital has raised an additional $100 million through convertible senior secured notes, bringing its total financing to $685 million. According to documents filed with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), the new financing came from existing investors and sponsors who exercised their option to purchase more notes, an option originally granted in an April financing round.
Twenty One Capital was launched by Cantor's Brandon Lutnick through a SPAC structure, its well-known owners include iFinex and Tether, and is led by Strike CEO Jack Mallers. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Opinion: Hyperliquid's vault may be at risk if James Wynn is liquidated
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to @ai_9684xtpa monitoring, the person most worried about James Wynn's impending liquidation may not be himself, but Hyperliquid Vault (HLP), with nearly 500 million positions being dispatched.

data.title: Arkham: 97% of Strategy Bitcoin holdings have been identified on-chain
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Arkham posted on the X platform that it has tracked and identified 53,800 additional BTC (about 5.75 billion US dollars) of Strategy, and the total tracking volume has reached 59.92 billion US dollars of BTC, accounting for 97% of its total holdings. The data is based on the newly identified Strategy address of 70,800 BTC yesterday. Arkham said that about 107,000 BTC are held in Fidelity and cannot be identified on the chain, and the remaining 454,000 are in independent custody addresses visible on the chain. The goal is to achieve real-time public reserve proof of Strategy BTC assets.

data.title: Kazakhstan to Launch CryptoCity Pilot Project for Cryptocurrency Payments
data.description: According to Odaily, Kazakhstan's President Kassym-Jomart Tokayev announced the launch of a pilot project named 'CryptoCity' at the 2025 Astana International Forum. This initiative will allow the use of cryptocurrencies for payments of goods and services within a designated area. The project aims to create a regulated digital asset sandbox environment to promote the practical application of cryptocurrencies. CryptoCity is expected to be established near the southeastern border of Kazakhstan in a settlement called Alatau.

data.title: U.S. Trade Environment Remains Uncertain Despite Court Ruling on Tariffs
data.description: According to Odaily, Capital Economics analyst John Higgins has highlighted ongoing volatility and uncertainty in the stock and commodity markets, even after the U.S. International Trade Court ruled most of President Donald Trump's tariffs invalid. Higgins noted that the stock market's muted reaction to the court's decision indicates that the risks associated with Trump's tariff policies have already been factored into market pricing. He further stated that as long as traders continue to question the validity of these tariff policies, the likelihood of significant interest rate cuts by the Federal Reserve remains minimal. Additionally, existing agreements between the U.S. and other trade partners also face uncertainty.

data.title: Bitcoin Predicted to Reach $1 Million in Five Years, Says Blockstream CEO
data.description: According to PANews, Blockstream CEO and early Bitcoin advocate Adam Back recently forecasted that Bitcoin could rise to $1 million within the next five years. This prediction highlights the ongoing optimism among cryptocurrency enthusiasts about Bitcoin's future potential.

data.title: Opinion: If traders still question the effectiveness of tariffs, the Fed's rate cut will be minimal
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: John Higgins, an analyst at Capital Economics, pointed out in a report that even if the US International Trade Court ruled that most of President Trump's tariffs were invalid, the trade environment for stocks and commodities is still full of volatility and uncertainty. Higgins said that the stock market reacted flatly to the ruling of the International Trade Court-the market has long incorporated the risk premium of Trump's tariff policy into pricing. He added that as long as traders are still questioning the effectiveness of the tariff policy, the possibility of a sharp interest rate cut by the Federal Reserve is slim. In addition, the agreements that the United States has reached with other trading partners are also facing uncertainty. (Jinshi)

data.title: Kazakhstan to pilot CryptoCity to promote cryptocurrency payments and applications
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Kazakhstan President Kassym-Jomart Tokayev announced at the 2025 Astana International Forum that a pilot project called "CryptoCity" will be launched to allow the use of cryptocurrencies for payment of goods and services in specific areas. The project aims to establish a regulated digital asset sandbox environment to promote the application of cryptocurrencies in real life. It is reported that CryptoCity is currently expected to be established in Alatau, a settlement near the southeastern border of Kazakhstan. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Report: Tether and Tron dominate the stablecoin payment market, Circle is catching up
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Artemis, Dragonfly and Castle Island Ventures released a report stating that in the stablecoin payment market, Tether (USDT) accounts for 90% of the transaction volume, and Tron is the preferred settlement network, accounting for about 60%. The annualized payment data in February 2025 reached US$72.3 billion. Although Circle USDC is catching up and is also eroding market share, it is far inferior to USDT in payment scenarios. The latter is widely regarded as a substitute for the US dollar, especially in emerging markets such as Argentina and Brazil. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Kamino is about to launch the fourth season incentive activities
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Solana Ecosystem DeFi Protocol Kamino posted on the X platform that the fourth season incentive activity will be launched in the next few days, aiming to increase the adoption and usage of new and existing products on Kamino. It is reported that Kamino Points will no longer be the only reward mechanism, and the KMNO staking function will be used to increase deposit rewards.

data.title: Nigel Farage to Unveil Cryptocurrency Policy at Bitcoin Conference
data.description:
According to Odaily, Nigel Farage, leader of the UK Reform Party, is set to announce a cryptocurrency policy plan at an upcoming Bitcoin conference. The plan, reminiscent of U.S. President Donald Trump's style, aims to garner support from younger British voters. Farage intends to propose a new 'Cryptocurrency Bill' to Parliament if his party wins the next UK general election, with the goal of establishing the UK as a 'crypto powerhouse.'

The proposed legislation includes significant measures such as reducing the capital gains tax on crypto investments from the current 24% to 10%. Additionally, it plans to introduce a two-year regulatory sandbox to foster crypto innovation in London's financial district. The bill also seeks to prohibit restrictions on services accepting crypto payments, thereby protecting consumer rights in the use of cryptocurrencies.
